MarketDeal.title: Market Deal
MarketDeal.description: Information about a specific retail or commercial property deal in Inland Empire.

city.description: City in Inland Empire (e.g., Riverside, San Bernardino).

squareFootage.description: Total square footage of the property.

createdAt.description: When the deal was added to the system.

userId.description: The UID of the user who added the deal.

MarketTrend.title: Market Trend
MarketTrend.description: Historical market statistics for Inland Empire retail/commercial real estate.

avgPricePerSqFt.description: Average price per square foot for the period.

avgCapRate.description: Average capitalization rate for the period.

vacancyRate.description: Market vacancy rate for the period.

inventoryCount.description: Total properties active in the market.

marketTrends.description: Collection of historical Inland Empire market trends.
